description: §21.3 — importing `{ present }` from a sibling m.scrml that DOES export `present()` resolves cleanly; E-IMPORT-004 stays silent.
rationale: §21.3: an import of a name that exists in the target's export set is legal. m.scrml exports `present`, so `import { present }` must not fire E-IMPORT-004 — the clean twin of the name-not-exported case.
